crewmates.name: Engineer
crewmates.description: Can use the vents to travel around the map.

crewmates.name: Lookout
crewmates.description: Can watch a player to see who visits them.

crewmates.name: Mayor
crewmates.description: Can store votes and release them all at once in a meeting.

crewmates.name: Medic
crewmates.description: Can grant a player a one-time shield that prevents a kill.

crewmates.name: Medium
crewmates.description: Can hear from dead players during meetings.

crewmates.name: Mystic
crewmates.description: Can check if a dead player's alignment was Good or Evil.

crewmates.name: Seer
crewmates.description: Can investigate a player to see their exact role.

crewmates.name: Snitch
crewmates.description: Learns Impostors' identities after finishing their tasks.

crewmates.name: Trapper
crewmates.description: Can place a trap that reveals who triggered it.

impostors.name: Blackmailer
impostors.description: Can prevent a player from speaking during meetings.

impostors.name: Bomber
impostors.description: Can plant a remote bomb on another player to kill them.

impostors.name: Eclipsal
impostors.description: Can cause a total darkness where only Impostors can see.

impostors.name: Escapist
impostors.description: Can guess a player's role, and if correct, remove them from the game.

impostors.name: Janitor
impostors.description: Can clean a body, making it unreportable.

impostors.name: Miner
impostors.description: Can place temporary vents anywhere on the map.

impostors.name: Undertaker
impostors.description: Can drag a body, which will auto-report after some time.

neutrals.name: Amnesiac
neutrals.description: Can remember the role of a dead player and take on their goal.

neutrals.name: Executioner
neutrals.description: Wins if their specific target is voted out.

neutrals.name: Fairy
neutrals.description: Wins if their linked target survives to the end of the game.

neutrals.name: Jester
neutrals.description: Wins if they get voted out by the other players.
